metadata.title: MaaEnd - Endfield Assistant
metadata.description: Advanced AI automation assistant for "Arknights: Endfield". Intelligent, Efficient, Cross-platform.

hero.title: MaaEnd
hero.subtitle: MAA - End
hero.tagline: "Arknights: Endfield" Automated Assistant Tool Powered by Visual Recognition

realTimeTask.title: Real-time Assist
realTimeTask.detail: Early-game copilot upgraded! Focus fire, attacks/dodges/chains, and smart story branch/skip; auto handles guidance, manual pages, and voice cleanup. Plus loot, teleports, ziplines, puzzles, and mounts for a buttery smooth run~ 🎮

puzzleSolver.title: Puzzle Solver
puzzleSolver.detail: AI solves puzzles instantly — no more scratching your head! Supports single/loop/demo modes 😎

essenceFilter.title: Essence Filter
essenceFilter.detail: Intelligently recognizes essence attributes, auto-filters and keeps the best stats — trash cleared in one click, no more manual checking! 💎

blueprints.title: Auto Trading
blueprints.detail: Merchant mode enabled! Automatically finds the highest-profit goods, buys them, then hops to friends' ships for one-stop selling. Prefer manual control? It can also provide purchase-only recommendations~ 💸

dailyRewards.title: Daily Automation
dailyRewards.detail: Daily bundle expanded! Auto base restock, clues, and rewards (missions/pass/mail/storage); covers simulation, wiki dots, handbook, Baker chats, friend visits, and delivery snipes. Plus exchanges, shopping, transfers, and batch crafting—all in one click! ✅

crossPlatform.title: Cross Platform
crossPlatform.detail: PC + Android fully supported — enjoy the game on any platform! 🐟

about.title: AI VISUAL AUTOMATION
about.paragraph1: More than a script, MaaEnd is an AI-driven automation core. Built on MaaFramework’s black-box architecture, it uses a [Capture → Recognize → Decide → Execute] visual loop to provide human-like intelligence with a non-invasive, memory-safe approach.
about.paragraph2: From solving complex puzzles instantly and intelligently filtering essence stats to providing real-time early-game assistance, MaaEnd is dedicated to handing repetitive labor over to AI. Operating with high efficiency across both PC and mobile, it lets you leave tedious configuration behind and return to the pure joy of strategy and exploration.

footer.marquee: LET'S AUTOMATE THE FUTURE OF ARKNIGHTS: ENDFIELD
footer.description: An advanced AI automation assistant for Endfield. Open source, secure, and highly efficient.
footer.copyright: MaaEnd TEAM. OPEN SOURCE UNDER AGPL-3.0.
footer.designGoalNote: The webpage content reflects the product design goals; AI priority refers to the module/project name.
